title: Calanthe tankervilleae
taxonomy: Calanthe tankervilleae is a species of orchid, classified within the family Orchidaceae. This family is further divided into several subfamilies, with Calanthe tankervilleae belonging to the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Calanthe is a group of terrestrial orchids, commonly known as the hard-leaved orchids. Calanthe tankervilleae specifically is part of the tribe Zehillinae. This classification helps to organize and understand the evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
uses: Calanthe tankervilleae, a species of orchid, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically verified. parts: Calanthe tankervilleae, also known as the Tankerville orchid, is a type of flowering plant that has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes.
